---
pagetitle: "Michael J. Moody"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="home-layout">
  <div class="home-left">
    <p>Graduate Student in Physics, University of Delaware</p>
    <p>[A sentence or two about your research interests.]</p>
    <hr>
    <p><a href="files/cv.pdf">CV</a> &nbsp;·&nbsp; <a href="mailto:mjmoody@udel.edu">Email</a> &nbsp;·&nbsp; <a href="https://github.com/mj-moody">GitHub</a></p>
  </div>
  <div class="home-right">
    <img src="files/photo.png" alt="">
  </div>
</div>
```
